title: autobench.continuous.promotion_decision v1
description: Emitted by continuous.py when a PopulationRunner cycle ends. Records the top confirmed-AHE advocate and whether the canonical harness was swapped. Three terminal decisions: staged (logged only — default, awaiting human approval), accepted (the canonical harness was swapped via _promote), rejected (an explicit reject path was taken). When no advocate is promotable the event is still emitted with candidate_advocate_id=null and decision=staged so the ledger is contiguous across cycles. Source: /autobench/continuous.

cycle_id.description: ULID identifying the population cycle this decision applies to.

candidate_advocate_id.description: advocate-N id of the selected candidate, or null when no advocate was promotable on this cycle.

candidate_session_id.description: Session ULID of the candidate advocate, or null.

candidate_score.description: best_score of the candidate. 0.0 when no candidate.

candidate_adjusted_score.description: Diversity-adjusted score of the candidate. 0.0 when no candidate.

ahe_outcome.description: AHE outcome label of the candidate's latest prediction. Cross-run promotion only selects 'confirmed' or 'partial'.

decision.description: staged: logged only, canonical NOT swapped. accepted: _promote fired, canonical was swapped. rejected: explicit reject path, canonical NOT swapped.

decided_by.description: Source of the decision: 'cli' (--confirm-promotion), 'env' (AUTOBENCH_CONFIRM_PROMOTION), 'auto-skip' (no promotable candidate), 'auto-reject' (explicit reject flag), or 'default' (stage-only).

reason.description: Optional human-readable reason (e.g. 'all advocates refuted', 'operator rejected via CLI').
